entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A drought-tolerant and grain-nutrient dense food crop grown in semi-arid regions of Asia and Africa

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand drought conditions

entities.name: GRAIN NUTRIENT DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of nutrients within the grain of the crop

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low rainfall and arid conditions

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where finger millet is grown

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where finger millet is grown

entities.name: FORAGE
entities.description: Plant material used as livestock feed, specifically the stover of finger millet

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals fed with finger millet forage

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: The facility where the global collection of finger millet germplasm is conserved

entities.name: FORAGE QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional and digestive value of the crop's forage

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variability existing within the finger millet germplasm collection

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop residue produced per unit area

entities.name: CRUDE PROTEIN
entities.description: A measure of the protein content in the forage

entities.name: DRY MATTER CONTENT
entities.description: The proportion of the forage that remains after water is removed

entities.name: ASH CONTENT
entities.description: The inorganic residue remaining after the combustion of forage

entities.name: NEUTRAL DETERGENT FIBER
entities.description: A measure of the total cell wall constituents in forage

entities.name: ACID DETERGENT FIBER
entities.description: A measure of cellulose and lignin in forage

entities.name: ACID DETERGENT LIGNIN
entities.description: A measure of the lignin content in forage

entities.name: METABOLIZABLE ENERGY
entities.description: The energy available to the animal after digestion

entities.name: IN VITRO ORGANIC MATTER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The proportion of organic matter that can be digested in a laboratory setting

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area at maturity

entities.name: MATURITY STAGE
entities.description: The stage of crop development when grain yield is measured

entities.name: FOOD-FEED TRAITS
entities.description: Combined traits related to both food (grain) and feed (forage) production

entities.name: DUAL-PURPOSE CULTIVARS
entities.description: Crop varieties developed for both grain and forage production
